query:
SELECT s.id, s.title, s.layout, s.orderIndex, m.slug as module_slug
FROM slides s
JOIN modules m ON m.id = s.moduleId
WHERE m.slug LIKE '%historia%' OR m.slug LIKE '%hist%' OR m.title LIKE '%Hist%'
ORDER BY m.id, s.orderIndex;
